## Task
Build a child page for **GH Copilot in Web UI**.

- Title: **GH Copilot in Web UI**
- File name: `gh-copilot-web-ui.html`
- The page should follow the same structure and style as the home page (`index.html`).
- Include links to:
	- https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/concepts/agents/cloud-agent/about-cloud-agent
	- https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/concepts/agents/code-review

## Assigned to
Cloud Agent on Github.com

## Completion
Once the page is built:
1. Commit the changes
2. Pull and rebase from remote: `git pull --rebase origin main`
3. Push to remote: `git push origin main`
4. Close this issue from the GitHub UI or with `gh issue close <this-issue-number>`
